overview: A full-stack Netflix-style Anime OTT streaming platform. Users can browse trending anime, watch episodes with a polished video player, and build a personal watchlist. Admins manage all content from a secure panel at /preview with permanent cloud-backed storage, season/episode management, and real-time sync to the live site.
features: Netflix-style dark UI with red accents and animated hero banner slider
Anime browsing with carousels: Trending, New Releases, genre-based sections
Episode video player supporting MP4, YouTube, and Google Drive links
Season & episode management system with season selectors
Secure admin panel at /preview with hamburger menu Admin Login
Full CRUD for anime, seasons, and episodes with toast notifications
User authentication, watchlists, star ratings, and threaded comments
AI chat assistant with anime request submission and admin management
PopAds integration on live site only
Permanent cloud storage — data never disappears after refresh
